manifest.composition_order: dycore_step -> Thompson mp=8 -> MYNN bl=5 -> RRTMG LW/SW ra=4/4 -> Gen2 wrfbdy boundary
manifest.tolerance_rationale: M6B5 dycore-step tolerance plus 1e-10 abs cap for physics-tendency fields per ADR-007 fp64-strict exception.

oracle.limitation: Fallback only: linear interpolation between hourly WRF history outputs. No per-RK-stage or per-acoustic-substep Fortran savepoints were available.

transfer_audit.note: Comparator reads HDF5 before isolated validation calls; no production timestep loop is executed.

wrf_manifest.license_notes: Derived, compact column/patch fixture from local real CPU WRF NetCDF history; original WRF outputs stay outside git.
wrf_manifest.limitation: Fallback only: linear interpolation between hourly WRF history outputs. No per-RK-stage or per-acoustic-substep Fortran savepoints were available.
